title: Add pagination to tasks page and API

log.context: Add pagination to tasks page and API

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Backend (`/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`)**
- `restServeTasks` now accepts a `URLSearchParams` argument and reads `?page` (default 1) and `?limit` (default 50, max 500)
- Returns `{ tasks: [...], total: N, page: N, limit: N, pages: N }` instead of a bare array
- Page is clamped to valid range; offset/slice applied after sorting

**Frontend (`/mnt/data/hello-world/tasks.html`)**
- Added CSS for `.pagination`, `.page-btn`, `.page-info`
